overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a foggy forest at night. The scene begins near a wooden house with an illuminated signpost, then follows a dirt path lined with street lamps into increasingly dense woodland. The atmosphere is dark and atmospheric with blue moonlight filtering through the trees.

events.description: character walks past the wooden house and enters the forest trail

agents.ego_description: walking away from the wooden house along a dirt path, passing a signpost on the right side

entered.detail: two-story wooden building with warm light emanating from windows
wooden signpost with directional signs including one reading WITCH
tall evergreen trees surrounding the clearing
unpaved trail leading from the house into the forest
lit lamp post illuminating the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a wooden house in a forest clearing at night. The character walks forward along a dirt path, passing a signpost on the right, and moves toward the tree line as the house recedes behind.

events.description: character passes closely by a lit street lamp on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path, passing under street lamps that cast warm orange light on the trail

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a narrow forest path enclosed by dense pine trees. A street lamp is passed closely on the right, providing temporary illumination before the path continues into darker woods. The house and signpost are no longer visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest interior with rocky terrain

events.description: large rock formation becomes visible on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing through the dense forest, navigating slightly uphill terrain with minimal artificial lighting

entered.detail: boulder or rock formation alongside the trail

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character traversing deeper into the forest where the path becomes darker and more enclosed. A large rock formation appears on the left side of the trail. The sky is partially visible through the canopy, and the artificial lighting from previous lamps has faded.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a small forest clearing into the deep, oppressive shadows of a dense woodland. It begins by moving away from a wooden house and passing an illuminated signpost as the character steps onto a dirt path. As the house recedes, the scene shifts into a narrow corridor of towering pine trees where a single street lamp provides a brief flash of light before the surroundings plunge back into darkness. The path then becomes increasingly enclosed and dim, leading the camera past a large rock formation on the left. Finally, the artificial light fades entirely, leaving only the faint glimpse of the night sky filtering through the thick overhead canopy.
